import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None

def test_possible_change_empty_coins():
    """Test that possible_change handles empty coins list correctly."""
    # When coins is empty, there are 0 ways to make any positive total
    assert source.possible_change([], 5) == 0
    # Also test with total = 0 (should return 1 per base case)
    assert source.possible_change([], 0) == 1
    # Test with negative total (should return 0 per base case)
    assert source.possible_change([], -1) == 0
